name: vscode-imagegen
description: Generate and insert optimized images using Gemini, OpenAI and more — directly in VS Code with GitHub Copilot integration.

enumDescriptions: Google — Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview) · $67/1k imgs
Google — Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image) · $134/1k imgs
imagegen.provider.description: The image generation provider and model to use.

imagegen.outputDirectory.description: Workspace-relative folder where generated .webp images are saved.

imagegen.webpQuality.description: WebP compression quality (0–100). Used by the Copilot tool; the manual panel has its own quality slider.

imagegen.requestTimeoutMs.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for provider API calls.

imagegen.maxInputImageMB.description: Maximum allowed input image size in MB for image-edit operations.

imagegen.embedPromptMetadata.description: Embed the generation or edit prompt as XMP metadata inside saved WebP files. Disable this if prompts may contain sensitive text.

languageModelTools.name: imagegen_generateImage
languageModelTools.userDescription: Generates an AI image from a text prompt using the configured provider (Gemini, OpenAI, FLUX, Seedream) and saves it as an optimized .webp file.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use this tool when the user asks to create, generate, draw, illustrate, or visualize any image — for example a blog post header, a documentation diagram, a logo concept, a banner, or any decorative illustration. The tool generates an image from a text description and returns a ready-to-paste Markdown image link (![alt](path.webp)) referencing the saved file.

prompt.description: Detailed text description of the image to generate. Be specific about style, subject, colors, and mood.

aspectRatio.description: Optional aspect ratio for the image.

saveMode.description: Where to save the generated image. Use 'temporary' for disposable files outside the workspace, or omit for normal persistent project output.

languageModelTools.name: imagegen_editImage
languageModelTools.userDescription: Edits an existing image using an instruction prompt and saves the result as an optimized .webp file.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use this tool when the user asks to modify, transform, retouch, or restyle an existing image. Accept an input image source (workspace path, absolute path, URL, data URL, or Markdown image snippet), apply the edit prompt with the configured provider, and return a ready-to-paste Markdown image link (![alt](path.webp)).

prompt.description: Detailed instruction describing how to modify the input image.

inputImage.description: Image source to edit: workspace-relative path, absolute path, URL, data URL, or markdown image snippet ![alt](path).

aspectRatio.description: Optional target aspect ratio for the edited output.

saveMode.description: Where to save the edited image. Use 'temporary' for disposable files outside the workspace, or omit for normal persistent project output.
